readHSFromFile() - Method in class javashooter.playground.HighscoreManager
 
receive(String) - Method in class javashooter.controller.ObjectController
Confirms receipt of a broadcast message by an object.
RECTANGLE - Static variable in class javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
 
RectArtist - Class in javashooter.rendering
Rendering an object as a filled rectangle of a specified color and size.
RectArtist(GameObject, double, double, Color) - Constructor for class javashooter.rendering.RectArtist
 
RectCollider - Class in javashooter.collider
Collider for a rectangular object.
RectCollider(String, GameObject, double, double) - Constructor for class javashooter.collider.RectCollider
 
RectObject - Class in javashooter.gameobjects
Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a rectangular object.
RectObject(String, Playground, double, double, double, double, double, double, Color) - Constructor for class javashooter.gameobjects.RectObject
Constructor.
redraw(Graphics2D) - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
Internal, do not call directly.
redrawLevel(Graphics2D) - Method in class javashooter.playground.MousePickerLevel
(re)draws the level but NOT the objects, they draw themselves.
redrawLevel(Graphics2D) - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
To be redefined!!
redrawLevelAfter(Graphics2D) - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
To be redefined!!
repaint() - Method in class javashooter.ui.GameUI
 
reset() - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
Reinitializes the level.
resetAction() - Static method in class javashooter.ui.GameUI
 
resetRequested() - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
 
runGame(String[]) - Method in class javashooter.gameutils.GameLoop
runs the game.
